sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74255" key="o)cugwnio/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξυ-γωνιότης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ητος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n74255.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">a being acute-angled,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1165.tlg001:159:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Apollod.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Poliorc.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">159.7</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
